headline: Pramata CEO Praful Saklani Joins the C-suite Unplugged Panel at the CLOC Global Institute Conference
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, May 06, 2026--Pramata, the leader in contract intelligence, today announced Pramata CEO Praful Saklani will take part in the C-suite Unplugged panel at the 2026 CLOC Global Institute Conference in Chicago on May 12, 2026. Saklani will join Shahzad Bashir, Founder, Chairman and CEO for Morae; Donovan Bell, Head of Global Operations for Corporate Affairs for Intel; and Aine Lyons, Senior Vice President and Deputy General Counsel for Workday, to answer questions on leadership priorit
